decisions.title: Prioritize Explore V2 Data Integrity Issues Over Feature Work
decisions.context: Multiple critical bugs affecting Explore V2 data accuracy (SCS-798, SCS-910, ENG-5699, ENG-7870) threaten customer trust in our core product. Data mismatches between V1/V2 and missing live data directly impact 'Nail the Core' pillar.

arguments.for: Data integrity is foundational to Decisions Captured metric; bugs erode confidence in evidence quality; delays compound customer frustration
arguments.against: Feature velocity slows on Canvas, Python Rules; may miss Q1 commitments on 'Embed Deeper' initiatives

decisions.title: Accelerate Foreign Key Removal (ENG-6688) to Unblock Sharding
decisions.context: Channel-bucket sharding investigation (ENG-8567) and ingestion scalability improvements are blocked by Run-Asset-Channel schema debt. Critical for 'Build the Moat' through performance differentiation.
decisions.blockedBy: Schema migration strategy for production databases; backward compatibility testing

arguments.for: Enables horizontal scaling for ingestion; removes bottleneck for large customers; aligns with parquet export optimization (ENG-8945)
arguments.against: High-risk migration requiring extensive testing; pulls senior engineers from feature work; potential downtime exposure

decisions.title: Ship Rule Parameterization (ENG-8815) as Python Rules MVP
decisions.context: Rule parameterization is foundational for Python Rules product. Shipping this enables 'Embed Deeper' by letting customers create reusable decision logic. ENG-8256 family view integration shows customer demand.

arguments.for: Directly increases decisions captured per customer; enables template marketplace; strong customer pull from design partners
arguments.against: Backend testing incomplete; UI polish (ENG-8655) not finished; documentation (ENG-6748) needs updating before launch

decisions.title: Standardize Observability Before Scaling (ENG-8887, ENG-8852, ENG-7213)
decisions.context: Adding prometheus metrics, keycloak alerts, and ingestion telemetry across 3 separate tickets. Need unified observability strategy as we scale infrastructure for Sift Edge and increased ingestion volume.

arguments.for: Prevents blind spots as complexity grows; enables proactive incident response; required for SOC2 compliance roadmap
arguments.against: Engineering overhead across multiple teams; metrics strategy not yet defined; potential alert fatigue if not curated

decisions.title: Commit to Ephemeral Environments (ENG-8941, ENG-8915) for Q2
decisions.context: GitHub workflows for deploy and destroy emerging. Investment would accelerate Canvas and Ask SIFT iteration cycles, supporting 'Embed Deeper' through faster feedback loops.

arguments.for: Reduces merge conflicts; enables parallel feature development; improves QA efficiency by 40% based on industry benchmarks
arguments.against: Infrastructure costs increase 15-20%; adds complexity to CI/CD; requires training for engineering team

keyResults.name: Explore V2 Feature Parity with V1

timeAudit.weekSummary: 55% meeting load constraining deep technical work on data integrity issues; 3 bug triage sessions indicating reactive posture
alerts: Only 8 free hours this week for strategic thinking on foreign key migration
Data integrity bugs require uninterrupted engineering time but calendar fragmented
5 one-on-ones today leaves no time for hands-on technical decision validation
